response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of software development experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js core that maps directly to the primary stack. His current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare and high-value match for this position's AI agent requirement. A deep, career-long TDD and testing culture (including authoring his own test runner and testing library) addresses the testing framework requirement well. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience and no mention of Kotlin; React also appears only briefly. These are learnable given his demonstrated breadth, and do not significantly undermine an otherwise strong profile.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js depth across multiple production roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital), matching the primary stack precisely
Explicit AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture demonstrated through a custom D testing framework, TDD workshops, and consistent TDD advocacy across roles
concerns: Nest.js is never mentioned despite being the specified backend framework; would need to validate familiarity or ramp-up willingness
Kotlin is absent from the resume; Java is present but limited to older embedded/tooling work, not JVM web services
React surfaces only once (Optilyz) without depth; frontend capabilities appear secondary to backend and tooling strengths
